response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and valuable experience with distributed systems at scale, he falls critically short of the minimum qualifications. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming, but his C++ background is minimal (~6 months at National Instruments plus thesis work). Additionally, the position demands infrastructure and compute-technology focus, whereas his career has been primarily application-layer and services-oriented. His current technical leadership role is only 1 month old, offering no demonstrated track record in the mentoring and leadership requirements for this mid-senior level position.
strengths: Proven experience with large-scale distributed systems and microservices (Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second)
Track record of shipping and scaling products to production impact (WatchUp top 10 app, Optilyz millions of mails annually)
Demonstrated commitment to engineering best practices, testing methodologies, and knowledge sharing through workshops and code dojos
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: only ~1-2 years total versus 8-year minimum requirement
Minimal formal technical leadership experience: current staff role is only 1 month old with no demonstrated history mentoring cloud/DevOps teams
Career background is application and services-focused rather than infrastructure, compute technologies, and hardware architecture that the role emphasizes
